name: Blender MCP
description: Connects Claude and other LLMs to Blender via MCP. Create 3D scenes, generate materials, run Python scripts, and inspect viewports from an AI agent prompt.

skills.name: 3D Scene Creation
skills.description: Create and modify 3D scenes in Blender from natural language prompts via MCP tool calls

skills.name: Material Generation
skills.description: Generate and apply procedural materials to 3D objects using node setups controlled by MCP

skills.name: Python Scripting
skills.description: Execute Python scripts inside Blender to automate complex modeling and rendering workflows

skills.name: Viewport Inspection
skills.description: Capture viewport screenshots and inspect scene hierarchy for visual feedback to the AI agent
